Simplify Curve: Choose a name for the category of the panel

简化曲线: - 在对象模式下选择 2 个对象、
- 选择要焊接的类型（几何图形/装饰条）
Simplify Curve: - choose what type of weld you want to place (Geometry/Decal)

简化曲线: - 移动鼠标调整比例（LMB 应用，RMB 设置为默认比例）
Simplify Curve: - adjust scale by moving the mouse (LMB to apply, RMB sets to default scale)

简化曲线: - 移动鼠标调整旋转角度（LMB 应用，RMB 设置为默认旋转角度）
Simplify Curve: - adjust rotation by moving the mouse (LMB to apply, RMB sets to default rotation)

简化曲线: - 在编辑模式下选择所需的折边、
Simplify Curve: - select desired edgeloop in edit mode,

简化曲线: - 点击 RMB 或 Enter 以完成绘制并放置焊缝
Simplify Curve: - click RMB or Enter in order to finish drawing and place weld
